---
title: "CHARM"
---

This chapter documents the Cloud Run workflow for generating CHARM products and derived anomaly datasets.

## Purpose

The workflow ingests satellite and environmental inputs, generates CHARM bloom products, computes anomaly layers, and publishes NetCDF outputs for ERDDAP distribution.

The system supports:

- Daily CHARM bloom products
- Daily anomaly generation
- Monthly composite workflows
- ERDDAP-ready NetCDF publication

## Repository structure

```text
charm/
├── config/
│   ├── config.yml          # Runtime settings
│   └── requirements.txt    # Python dependencies
├── deploy_job.sh           # Build, push, and deploy Cloud Run jobs
├── Dockerfile              # Container definition
├── entrypoint.sh           # Job mode selector
├── scripts/
│   ├── control_charm.py            # Daily workflow controller
│   ├── make_charm.py               # Daily CHARM processor
│   ├── control_charm_monthly.py    # Monthly workflow controller
│   ├── make_charm_monthly.py       # Monthly composite processor
│   └── make_charm_anomaly.py       # Anomaly generation
└── templates/
    ├── charm_template.nc           # Daily NetCDF template
    ├── charm_monthly_template.nc   # Monthly NetCDF template
    └── charm_anomaly_template.nc   # Anomaly template
```

## Cloud Run jobs

The workflow runs as multiple Cloud Run jobs using a shared container image and dispatch logic from `entrypoint.sh`.

| Job mode | Script | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `daily` | `control_charm.py` | Daily CHARM workflow |
| `monthly` | `control_charm_monthly.py` | Monthly CHARM composites |
| `anomaly` | `make_charm_anomaly.py` | Daily anomaly generation |

## Processing pipeline

Each daily run follows this sequence:

```text
Cloud Scheduler → Cloud Run Job → Download inputs → Generate CHARM product → Apply templates → Publish to GCS → ERDDAP ingestion
```

The controller script manages runtime configuration, date handling, input discovery, and calls the processing routines for each target date.

## Monthly composites

Monthly processing gathers daily CHARM outputs and generates monthly composite products for publication.

The workflow applies the monthly NetCDF templates and publishes finalized outputs to cloud storage for ERDDAP ingestion.

## Anomaly processing

The anomaly workflow computes departures from baseline or climatological conditions and publishes derived anomaly datasets.

These products are generated independently from the monthly compositing workflow and follow their own scheduled execution path.

## Templates and static assets

The workflow uses NetCDF templates and static reference assets to standardize output structure and metadata.

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `charm_template.nc` | Daily CHARM template |
| `charm_monthly_template.nc` | Monthly composite template |
| `charm_anomaly_template.nc` | Anomaly dataset template |

## Codebase {.unnumbered}

```{=html}
<div class="file-grid">

<div class="file-card">
<h3>Deployment</h3>
<p>Container and Cloud Run deployment configuration.</p>
<ul>
<li><a href="code-pages/charm/dockerfile.html">Dockerfile</a></li>
<li><a href="code-pages/charm/entrypoint.html">entrypoint.sh</a></li>
<li><a href="code-pages/charm/deploy_job.html">deploy_job.sh</a></li>
<li><a href="code-pages/charm/config.html">config.yml</a></li>
<li><a href="code-pages/charm/requirements.html">requirements.txt</a></li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="file-card">
<h3>Daily processing</h3>
<p>Daily CHARM orchestration and product generation.</p>
<ul>
<li><a href="code-pages/charm/control_charm.html">control_charm.py</a> - daily workflow controller</li>
<li><a href="code-pages/charm/make_charm.html">make_charm.py</a> - daily CHARM processor</li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="file-card">
<h3>Monthly composites</h3>
<p>Monthly CHARM compositing workflows.</p>
<ul>
<li><a href="code-pages/charm/control_charm_monthly.html">control_charm_monthly.py</a> - monthly workflow controller</li>
<li><a href="code-pages/charm/make_charm_monthly.html">make_charm_monthly.py</a> - monthly composite builder</li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="file-card">
<h3>Anomaly processing</h3>
<p>Derived anomaly generation workflows.</p>
<ul>
<li><a href="code-pages/charm/make_charm_anomaly.html">make_charm_anomaly.py</a> - anomaly generator</li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="file-card">
<h3>Templates and static assets</h3>
<p>Reference NetCDF templates and static metadata assets.</p>
<ul>
<li>charm_template.nc</li>
<li>charm_monthly_template.nc</li>
<li>charm_anomaly_template.nc</li>
</ul>
</div>

</div>
```
